hero.label: Locally Grown, Carefully Delivered
hero.headline: Safe, Fresh Food for Your Family
hero.subtext: We connect Dhaka families directly with trusted Bangladeshi farmers. Chemical-free groceries, packed with care.

product.deliveryDesc: Your package will arrive within 1-2 business days, freshly packed and delivered safely within Dhaka.
product.exchangesDesc: Is the fit not quite right? No worries - we'll exchange your product for a new one.
product.returnsDesc: Just return your product and we'll refund your money. No questions asked – we'll do our best to make sure your return is hassle-free.

cart.title: Cart
cart.reassurance: Packed hygienically and delivered safely within Dhaka.
